name: Appam and stew
description: Lacy fermented rice pancakes paired with a mild coconut-milk vegetable, chicken or mutton stew.

name: Karimeen pollichathu
description: Pearl spot fish marinated with spices, wrapped in banana leaf and grilled.

name: Puttu and kadala curry
description: Steamed rice-flour cylinders with coconut served with black-chickpea curry.

name: Kerala sadya
description: Vegetarian feast served on a banana leaf, especially common during Onam and temple festivals.
